# Hardware implementation of the OCaml virtual machine and runtime using Eclat

dependencies:
- ghdl
- dune
- eclat (see ../ocaml-compiler)
- obytelib & ocamlclean


## simulation of the circuit generated by the Eclat compiler, translated to OCaml  

```
$ make bytecode SRC=benchs/apply/apply.ml
$ make vm FLAGS=-ocaml
$ cd ../target/ml/
$ ocamlc runtime.ml main_step.ml
$ ./a.out -run 100000000             # for a given number of clock cycles
```

## simulation of the circuit generated by the Eclat compiler, translated to VHDL

It is the common way to test hardware at the register transfer level.

```
$ make bytecode SRC=benchs/apply/apply.ml
$ make simul
$ cd ../target
$ make
```

## synthesis for Intel FPGAs

```
$ make synth SRC=benchs/apply/apply.ml
$ make code
$ make data
```
